description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a prominent hip roof and a large, covered front porch supported by white columns. The exterior walls are clad in light brown brick, and the house features symmetrical window arrangements on the front and sides. The front entryway is accentuated by a wide staircase leading up to the porch, flanked by a pair of palm trees on a paved driveway. The rear of the house includes a garage door, and the side elevations show additional windows and the wraparound porch. The overall design is balanced and traditional, with clean lines and a focus on symmetry.
description: A two-story brick house with a hip roof, large front porch, symmetrical windows, and a rear garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide porch with white columns, central entryway, symmetrical windows, and palm trees on the driveway.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the wraparound porch, brick walls, and three evenly spaced windows on the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage door and the uninterrupted brick wall with the hip roof above.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the porch extending along the side, brick exterior, and additional palm tree landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with wide steps, covered porch supported by white columns, and decorative landscaping.
